LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JENNIFER COLIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. THE COURT MODIFIES THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. BOTH PARTIES'REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT INCORPORATES PLAINTIFF'S SUGGESTED APPROACH ON HANDLING RECORDS. PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER RE: THE PROPOSED ORDER, THEN SUBMIT AN AGREED UPON PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT. PARTIES TO SUBMIT COMPETING ORDERS IF THEY ARE UNABLE TO COME TO AN AGREEMENT. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Limit Or Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leslie F. Levy, Esq. of Levy Vinick Burrell Hyams LLP, T:510.318.7705, for plaintiff/moving party;
Jasmine L. Anderson, Esq. of Constangy Brooks Smith & Prophete LLP, T:415.918.3000, for defendant/opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff contested the tentative ruling. The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER COLIN's Motion To Limit Or Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records is granted in part and denied in part.

Both parties' requests for sanctions are denied.

Counsel for defendant to prepare a proposed order that repeats the Court's ruling as stated at the hearing and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Plaintiff Jennifer Colins Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leslie Levy, Esq. 510-318-7705 of LVBH for Plaintiff.
Jasmine Anderson, Esq. 415-918-3000 of Constangy Brooks Smith & Prophete LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views. Parties address the breadth/scope. Defendant requests compliance of 30 days. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER COLIN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Taken Under Submission.

Plaintiff's Counsel to submit a proposed order that tracks the Court's tentative ruling by email. The order shall attach a copy of the judge pro tem's report and recommendation. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Limit Or Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leslie F. Levy, Esq. of Levy Vinick Burrell Hyams, T:510.318.7705, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jasmine L. Anderson, Esq. of Constangy Brooks, Smith & Prophete LLP, T:415.656.6541, for defendant and opposing party.

The parties did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: Hearing held and the matter was argued. After arguments, PLAINTIFF JENNIFER COLIN's Motion To Limit Or Quash Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records is continued to October 15, 2019 at 9:30am in Department 302. JPT Douglas Robbins to prepare a Report and Recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leslie Levy, Esq. 510-318-7700 of Levy Vinick Burrell Hyams LLP for Plaintiff.
Jasmine Anderson, Esq. 415-918-3000 of Constangy Brooks Smith & Prophete LLP for Defendant Thyssenkrupp Elevator Company.

RULING - A R G U E D. Both sides argue how to retrieve, review, redact and limit the scope of medical and psychological records relating to the back injury and claim for emotional distress. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF JENNIFER COLIN'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas; Request For Sanctions.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling. The Motion is Granted in Part and Denied in Part. Both parties'requests for sanctions are denied. Plaintiff's Counsel to submit a Proposed order that incorporates Plaintiff's suggested approach on handling records. Parties are to meet and confer re: the Proposed Order, then submit an agreed upon Proposed order to the Court. Parties to submit competing orders if they are unable to come to an agreement. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
